methods.description: Recombinant Bet v 1 (WT and mutants) was expressed in Escherichia coli strain BL21(DE3) and purified using a modified pET-28b vector. The process involves growing cells, inducing protein expression, and purifying the proteins using size exclusion chromatography.

steps.description: Recombinant Bet v 1 (WT and mutants) was expressed in Escherichia coli strain BL21(DE3), using a modified pET-28b vector, lacking the N-terminal His 6 tag.
steps.searchable_summary: express recombinant Bet v 1 in E. coli using modified pET-28b vector

steps.description: Cells were grown in 600 ml of LB medium supplemented with 20 g/ml kanamycin at 37°C to an A 600 of 1.0.
steps.searchable_summary: grow E. coli cells in LB medium with kanamycin to A600 of 1.0

steps.description: After adding 1 mM isopropyl ␤-D-thiogalactopyranoside, expression was performed for 4 h at 37°C.
steps.searchable_summary: induce protein expression with IPTG for 4 hours at 37°C

steps.description: Proteins were purified in principle as described elsewhere, with some minor changes of the protocol.
steps.searchable_summary: purify expressed proteins using modified protocol

steps.description: As final step, multiple size exclusion chromatography (Superdex 75) was used to separate monomeric and dimeric forms.
steps.searchable_summary: separate protein forms using size exclusion chromatography

methods.description: Analysis of the dimeric state of Bet v 1 was performed using SDS-PAGE under reducing and nonreducing conditions, clear native PAGE, and Western blotting.

steps.description: Analysis of the dimeric state of Bet v 1 was monitored by SDS-PAGE under reducing (containing ␤-mercaptoethanol) and nonreducing conditions.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze dimeric state using SDS-PAGE under different conditions

steps.description: For clear native PAGE, 15% polyacrylamide gels were produced according to SDS-PAGE, just omitting SDS.
steps.searchable_summary: perform clear native PAGE without SDS

steps.description: As loading dye, 10% glycerol was used.
Anode buffer contained 25 mM imidazole, pH 7.0, cathode buffer 7.5 mM imidazole, pH 7.0, and 50 mM Tricine.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare anode and cathode buffers with specified compositions

steps.description: For Western blot, polyclonal rabbit anti-rBet v 1a IgG antibodies were used.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Western blot using specific antibodies

steps.description: Rabbit IgG was detected with alkaline phosphatase-conjugated goat anti-rabbit IgG Fc.
steps.searchable_summary: detect IgG using alkaline phosphatase-conjugated secondary antibody
inputs: alkaline phosphatase-conjugated goat anti-rabbit IgG Fc
